summary: Reframed the opening around Mina's physical residue and fatigue before Rhea's arrival so the chapter enters from a different angle than the adjacent Rhea-with-equipment summons opening, while preserving the existing handoff into Chapter 5.
edits: Shifted the first paragraph to begin inside Mina's room and body rather than on Rhea at the door.
Moved Rhea's mist-net-and-pencil description to the second paragraph so the opening scaffold no longer echoes Chapter 5's equipment-led entry.
Left the chapter's closing handoff intact because Mina's desire for another night with Rhea already leads cleanly into the next chapter.
